title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech explores whether Google engineers adopt code generation tools by comparing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities, then examining Google's own vibing practices across 2024-2026. The video uses the colloquial term "vibing code" to discuss practical adoption of AI-assisted development.
